prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海交通大学医学院在浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约591名、312名、476名、331名、513名，整体波动较大，近两年呈先升后降走势；2025年 基准位次约513名，较2024年（331名）明显后移约182名，反映出当年竞争有所缓和；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021年15人、2022年8人、2023年6人、2024 年5人、2025年4人，呈逐年递减趋势；2026年计划大幅回升至11人，较2025年扩招175%，显著增加招生名额，对录取位次有较大的下移（位次数字增大）压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学医学院隶属于上海交通大学（985/211/双一流，软科主榜第4名），是国内最顶尖的医学院之一，临床医学、口腔医学均为A+学科，办学层次极高，对高分考 生有持续吸引力；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学校管理、师德师风及学术不端等事件，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第42（较热 ），整体关注度仍较高；历史投档异常方面，2021年上海交通大学曾出现理科投档线在华五中偏低的记录，但医学院本身未见明显断档信号；临床医学（A+）、 口腔医学（A+）、基础医学（A-）、生物学（A+）、药学（A+）等均为顶尖水平，与招生专业高度匹配，对医学类考生有极强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学类专业社 会热度持续高热，医学方向报考竞争长期激烈；浙江省2026年高考考生总数约400,000人，较2025年（290,790人）大幅增长约37.6%，竞争加剧，对位次有上移（位次数字减小） 压力，无明显波动；上海交通大学医学院位于上海，对浙江考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在浙江省招生占 比从2021年4.78%逐年降至2025年0.82%，2026年计划回升后占比预计约2.2%，仍属外省招生占比较低的学校。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年招生计划大幅扩招175%（主导因素，推 动位次数字增大）与浙江省考生总数大幅增长37.6%（推动位次数字减小）的双向作用，以及声誉偏负面带来的轻微降温效应，预计2026年录取位次较2025年（513名）明显后移， 预测最低位次约1022名，区间899–1145名。

- 临床医学（八年制本博连读，口腔方向）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 上海交通大学医学院在浙江省仅招收临床医学类专业，所有专业均为顶尖医学方向，无传统意义上的低分专业。位次在预测区间（899–1145名）内的考生可积极冲刺，其中八年 制本博连读类（含法语班、口腔方向）为最难进的一档，临床医学（英语班）相对门槛略低。建议位次在区间上限附近的考生以二档为主目标，位次明显优于区间下限的考生可重 点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine in Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category were approximately 591, 312, 476, 331, and 513 respectively, showing significant fluctuations overall, with a trend of rising then falling in recent years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 513, which is notably 182 positions lower than 2024 (331), reflecting a slight easing of competition that year; the enrollment plan for this university in Zhejiang's comprehensive category was 15 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 6 in 2023, 5 in 2024, and 4 in 2025, showing a decreasing trend year by year; the 2026 plan significantly rebounds to 11, an increase of 175% compared to 2025, substantially expanding enrollment quotas, which exerts downward pressure on admission rankings (increasing ranking numbers).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is affiliated with Shanghai Jiao Tong University (985/211/Double First-Class, ranked 4th on the Soft Science main list), and is one of the top medical schools in China, with Clinical Medicine and Stomatology both rated A+, indicating an extremely high educational level that consistently attracts high-scoring students; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving incidents related to school management, teacher ethics, and academic misconduct, which may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; it ranks 42nd in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), indicating still high overall attention; regarding historical admission anomalies, in 2021, Shanghai Jiao Tong University had a record of relatively low science admission scores among the C9 League, but the medical school itself showed no clear signs of admission gaps; Clinical Medicine (A+), Stomatology (A+), Basic Medicine (A-), Biology (A+), and Pharmacy (A+) are all at top levels, highly matching the enrollment majors, exerting a strong attraction for medical-oriented candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine majors remain highly popular in society, with fierce competition in medical admissions over the long term; the total number of college entrance exam takers in Zhejiang Province for 2026 is approximately 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.6% compared to 2025 (290,790), intensifying competition and exerting upward pressure on rankings (decreasing ranking numbers), with no significant fluctuations; Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is located in Shanghai, which has a strong regional appeal for Zhejiang candidates; the proportion of enrollment from Zhejiang dropped from 4.78% in 2021 to 0.82% in 2025, and with the planned rebound in 2026, it is expected to be about 2.2%, still a relatively low proportion of enrollment from other provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the combined effects of the significant 175% expansion in the 2026 enrollment plan (dominant factor, pushing ranking numbers upward) and the substantial 37.6% increase in the total number of Zhejiang exam takers (pushing ranking numbers downward), along with the slight cooling effect from the negative reputation, it is expected that the 2026 admission ranking will be notably lower than 2025 (513), with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 1022, within a range of 899 to 1145.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine only enrolls clinical medicine majors in Zhejiang Province, all of which are top-tier medical directions, with no traditionally low-score majors. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (899–1145) can actively aim for admission, among which the eight-year bachelor-master-doctor programs (including French class and stomatology direction) are the most difficult to enter (Tier 1), while Clinical Medicine (English Class) has a slightly lower threshold. It is recommended that candidates near the upper limit of the range primarily target Tier 2 majors, while those significantly better than the lower limit can focus on aiming for the top-tier Tier 1 majors.
